title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.439 - Photograph of offender to be taken prior to release, when — provided to victim upon request
text:
217.439.  Photograph of offender to be taken prior to release, when — provided to victim upon request. — Upon the victim's request, a photograph shall be taken of the incarcerated individual prior to release from incarceration and a copy of the photograph shall be provided to the crime victim.
(L. 2009 H.B. 62 merged with S.B. 338)
